summary: Iteration 42 - Avatar/Presenter System and Video Mode Selector Testing - 6/7 backend tests passed, frontend verified. Key features tested: (1) POST /api/campaigns/pipeline/generate-avatar returns valid Supabase URL using Nano Banana AI, (2) POST /api/campaigns/pipeline/generate-presenter-video returns 503 when FAL_KEY not configured (graceful degradation), (3) Pipeline creation accepts video_mode and avatar_url fields, (4) Frontend company form has Avatar/Apresentador section with Upload Foto and Gerar com IA buttons, (5) Video Mode selector shows 3 options (Sem Video, Narracao, Apresentador), (6) Narracao is default selected, (7) Company card shows avatar thumbnail when avatar is set, (8) Guided Questionnaire is default briefing mode.

minor.issue: Transient 500 error on one test (httpx.RemoteProtocolError: Server disconnected) - likely connection issue not code bug

issues: Console warning: <button> cannot contain nested <button>. The company card has a button inside a button (star/X icons inside company card button). This is an HTML nesting violation but doesn't affect functionality.

backend_avatar_generation.returns: avatar_url with valid Supabase storage URL

backend_presenter_video_503.error_message: Presenter video requires FAL_KEY configuration. Contact admin.

frontend_company_card_avatar.behavior: Company card shows avatar thumbnail instead of Building icon when avatar_url is set

frontend_sem_video_click.behavior: Clicking Sem Video highlights it and sets skipVideo=true

frontend_apresentador_warning.condition: When Apresentador selected and no avatar in activeCompany
frontend_apresentador_warning.message: Cadastre um avatar na empresa para usar o modo apresentador

action_items: MINOR: Fix nested button HTML issue in PipelineView.jsx company cards (lines ~1368-1400) - star/X icons should be outside the main button or use different element structure
critical_code_review_comments: pipeline.py line 2552-2581: generate-avatar endpoint correctly uses LlmChat with Gemini model and uploads to Supabase storage
pipeline.py line 2584-2615: generate-presenter-video correctly checks for FAL_KEY and returns 503 when not configured
pipeline.py line 2650-2651: Pipeline creation correctly stores video_mode and avatar_url in result object
PipelineView.jsx line 897: videoMode state defaults to 'narration'
PipelineView.jsx line 1465-1478: Gerar com IA button calls POST /api/campaigns/pipeline/generate-avatar correctly
PipelineView.jsx line 1867-1891: Video mode selector UI with 3 options and warning message for presenter mode

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All avatar/video mode UI features verified

seed_data_creation: Created test company with avatar in localStorage for frontend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 42: Avatar/Presenter system fully tested. Backend endpoints: generate-avatar (works), generate-presenter-video (returns 503 gracefully - FAL_KEY not set). Frontend: Company form has Avatar section with Upload/Generate buttons. Video mode selector has 3 options with Narracao as default. Company cards show avatar thumbnails. Note: There's a minor HTML nesting issue (button inside button) in company cards that causes a console warning.

mocked_apis_list: generate-presenter-video requires FAL_KEY to actually generate lip-sync video - returns 503 gracefully when not configured
